title: Add clearer export confirmation and preview to prevent accidental exports
description:
User accidentally consumed limited exports by clicking Export before selecting intended options (date range, Obsidian Base). They want a clearer option flow, confirmation modal, and a preview of what will be exported.

> ugh I told you I'm dense! Yes, health.md 🤦🏻‍♂️. No, it's not that. I knew going in that there would be 3. It's more of an- I'm clicking around to see what the export options are how I want them and clicking the export before I selected the correct options. For example, I selected the date range then selected a different option (I can't recall which) and then reset the date range without realizing and used up an export on that. Another one I didn't see the option for Obsidian Base until after the exports were gone. I definitely did not want 4500 markdown files exported!

Source: https://discord.com/channels/1443424100759634003/1498086733349388318/1500865615223722065
author: CodyBontecou
